narrative:
Circleville 1-A (precinct in Pickaway County) has 1,107 registered voters, with 52.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.2 percentage points.
